[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11110101 6
1 01001000 2
2 01011010 4
3 10010011 4
4 10110000 3
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00000100 1
